entities.name: GENDER
entities.description: The social characteristic used to differentiate between male and female household heads in the context of vulnerability and adaptation planning

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The state of being exposed to the possibility of being harmed by climate change

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART SOLUTIONS
entities.description: Sustainable interventions designed to address climate change while being gender-responsive

entities.name: MALE HOUSEHOLD HEADS
entities.description: Men who lead households in the Sudanian zone of Mali

entities.name: FEMALE HOUSEHOLD HEADS
entities.description: Women who lead households in the Sudanian zone of Mali

entities.name: SUDANIAN ZONE OF MALI
entities.description: The geographical region in Mali where the study was conducted

entities.name: CINZANA
entities.description: A specific case study site located in the Segou region of Mali

entities.name: SEGOU REGION
entities.description: The administrative region in Mali containing Cinzana

entities.name: SEMI-STRUCTURED QUESTIONNAIRE INTERVIEWS
entities.description: A data collection technique used to gather information from household heads

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: A qualitative data collection technique used to gather group-level insights

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD VULNERABILITY INDEX
entities.description: A method used to assess the vulnerability of livelihoods to climate change

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The long-term shift in temperatures and weather patterns affecting the Sudanian zone of Mali

entities.name: SOCIO-DEMOGRAPHIC INDEX
entities.description: A major component of the Livelihood Vulnerability Index measuring social and demographic factors

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD STRATEGIES INDEX
entities.description: A major component of the Livelihood Vulnerability Index measuring how households sustain themselves

entities.name: SOCIAL NETWORK INDEX
entities.description: A major component of the Livelihood Vulnerability Index measuring social connectivity

entities.name: FOOD INDEX
entities.description: A major component of the Livelihood Vulnerability Index measuring food security

entities.name: NATURAL DISASTERS AND CLIMATE VARIABILITY INDEX
entities.description: A major component of the Livelihood Vulnerability Index measuring exposure to environmental shocks

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION SYSTEM INDEX
entities.description: A major component of the Livelihood Vulnerability Index measuring farming system characteristics

entities.name: ADAPTIVE CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of female household heads to adjust to climate change and variability

entities.name: FINANCIAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Monetary assets identified as a means to improve adaptive capacity

entities.name: WEATHER INFORMATION
entities.description: Information regarding weather patterns used to improve adaptive capacity

entities.name: FARMER-BASED GROUPS
entities.description: Groups for peer-learning used to improve adaptive capacity

entities.name: POLICY INITIATIVES
entities.description: Government or organizational actions to ensure gender mainstreaming

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs aimed at improving agriculture into which gender should be mainstreamed
